title: Unicode Inspector
description: Break down text char by char: code point, Unicode block, UTF-8 / UTF-16 bytes, JS/HTML/CSS escapes; iterates by code point (emoji-safe) and surfaces code-point vs UTF-16 vs UTF-8 length.

notice.title: Fully local
notice.body: All analysis runs in your browser — nothing is uploaded. Iterates by code point (not UTF-16 unit), so emoji and surrogate pairs count as one character.

input.label: Input text
input.placeholder: Paste or type text to inspect char by char
